[Level Select Right Dpad]
80004000
04100000 0186CEA0 00000008
20000000
***NOTE TO USING LEVEL SELECT MENU,
MUST BE IN BURRAMUDGEE TO USE.
JUST PAUSE GAME AND GOTO THE EXIT SCREEN
(HAS CONTINUE, SAVE GAME, MAIN MENU)
AND PRESS RIGHT DPAD THEN PRESS A TO ENTER***
VIDEO OF USAGE HERE HTTPS://YOUTU.BE/E_U9TFCHWJA
